text.title: Activation Framework Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the `spec` artefact this methodology produces. Validator at scripts/validate-activation-framework.py enforces the contract.

example.note: Missing required: owner, review_deadline, sections, deviation_log_reference.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: Artefact MUST NOT omit `owner` — orphan artefacts violate rule `named-owner`.
Artefact MUST NOT include keys outside the schema — `additionalProperties: false` is binding.
Artefact MUST NOT contain forbidden placeholder tokens in any string value (validator rejects them).
